title: Anakin Solo (starship)

{{Quote|What did he think? That he would drag our little brother's name into the poodoo pit with him?|Jaina Solo|<ref name="Tempest" />}}
The '''''Anakin Solo''''', also known as the '''''Anakin''''' for short or '''''Black Annie''''' to its crew, was a modified [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that served as the [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]—a pan-[[Galaxy/Legends|galactic]] conflict between the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] and the [[Confederation]]. Serving as the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], the ''Anakin Solo'' was named after Solo's [[Death/Legends|deceased]] [[Anakin Solo|brother]]. The commissioning of a GAG [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] reflected the Guard's expanding influence and responsibilities; by then the Guard had taken a more active role in the war, whereas their original purpose as a covert [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]] was to enforce domestic security on the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

Commissioned in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] at the [[General Crix Madine Military Reserve]] of Coruscant, the ''Anakin Solo'' secured its first victory at the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]]. It was also deployed to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] alongside the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] as a result of the Alliance's decision to [[Blockade of Corellia|blockade]] the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] in response to the Corellian [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] attacks on Coruscant. The ''Anakin Solo'' would continue to have an active part in the conflict following the [[Battle of Corellia (Second Galactic Civil War)|withdrawal]] of [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|Alliance forces]] from Corellia, participating in several battles across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] at [[Battle of Gilatter VIII|Gilatter VIII]], [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|Kuat]], [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Kashyyyk]], and [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Second Galactic Civil War)|Centerpoint Station]].

The ''Anakin Solo'' also played a role in Jacen Solo's plans as an aspiring [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]]. Solo, who had secretly renounced his role as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] in favor of becoming the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Caedus, [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] his cousin, [[Ben Skywalker]], [[Torture Chamber|aboard]] the ''Anakin Solo'' in an effort to convert the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. The attempt failed, however, leading Caedus to shift his attention to another potential [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]]—the Jedi Knight [[Tahiri Veila]]. Veila joined the Galactic Alliance Guard as a [[Junior Lieutenant/Legends|junior lieutenant]] and demonstrated her willingness to become Caedus' apprentice by ordering the ''Anakin Solo''{{'s}} [[Gunner/Legends|gunners]] to destroy a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[Fondorian]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. During the [[Second Battle of Fondor]], the ''Anakin Solo'' participated in a joint-[[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] operation between the Galactic Alliance and the [[Imperial Remnant]]. It was at [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] where the partnership between Caedus and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cha Niathal]] broke apart, resulting in the ''Anakin Solo''{{'s}} return to Coruscant where Caedus secured his position as the sole [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]].

The ''Anakin Solo'' went on to fight Caedus' enemies at the [[Battle of Uroro Station]] in [[41 ABY]]. In the course of the battle, the GAG [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] sustained heavy damage and was boarded by the forces of the [[Jedi Coalition]], resulting in the deaths of many GAG [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]]. At the same [[Time/Legends|time]], Caedus was confronted by his twin sister, [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], who killed the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] in [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|single combat]]. With Caedus' death and the fall of the ''Anakin Solo'', the Galactic Alliance reconciled with the [[New Jedi Order]] and agreed to a ceasefire with the Confederation, hence marking the end of the Second Galactic Civil War.

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|I was a gunner on the ''Anakin Solo'', Jacen Solo's Impstar Deuce. We called her the ''Black Annie''.|[[Tirs Maladane]]|<ref name="TEGTW" />}}
[[File:ISD_schematic_EGVV.png|thumb|left|200px|The ''Anakin Solo'' was a modified ''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer.]]
The ''Anakin Solo'' was a [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] that possessed both the usual features of its line and several modifications that ultimately distinguished it from other [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] of the similar design. In recognition of the ''Anakin Solo''{{'s}} status as the personal [[Transport/Legends|transport]] vessel of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[secret police]], the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] hull was painted in matte [[black]] rather than the typical [[white]] of Alliance Star [[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyers]]. In addition to its role as a mobile base of operations for the Guard, the ''Anakin Solo'' also functioned as a [[Carrier/Legends|carrier]] for smaller ships,<ref name="Tempest" /> such as the ''[[Duracrud]]'',<ref name="Exile" /> the [[Rover (skiff)|''Rover'']], [[XJ5 X-wing starfighter]]s and various [[TIE series/Legends|TIE fighter]] models.<ref name="Tempest" />

Designed for war, the ''Anakin Solo'' was equipped with an array of state-of-the-art armaments, ranging from [[Turbolaser/Legends|standard]] and [[long-range turbolaser]] batteries to [[Baradium/Legends|baradium]] and [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedos]] and advanced anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] weaponry. The ship's four long-range turbolasers, mounted in her nose, were cutting-edge technology, although they exhausted a substantial amount of the vessel's power, which necessitated the shutdown of non-essential systems prior to firing. As a result, their recharge speed was slower than the average rate. Other systems incorporated into the ''Anakin Solo's'' design included [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors, a [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well generator]] located at the belly of the Star Destroyer, a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking cone]] that rose midway down its spine, and [[Berda]]—an advanced tactical computer system operated by a group of [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Programmer/Legends|programmers]].<ref name="Tempest" />

Further additions to the ''Anakin Solo'' were devised by<ref name="Tempest" /> the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Caedus]],<ref name="Sacrifice" /> who served as the overall commanding officer of the GAG Star Destroyer in his public guise as [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Jacen Solo. One of the new additions was the [[Detention Center]], an area in the ship's belly that was unmarked so that [[Prisoner/Legends|detainees]] would not be aware of how close they were to the ship's [[Prison/Legends|prison]]. This was done to lessen the chances of resistance that could result in harm to inmates and security personnel.<ref name="Tempest" /> A secret interrogation chamber was constructed near the long-range batteries and housed a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Torture/Legends|torture]] device known as the [[Embrace of Pain]].<ref name="Inferno" /> The Colonel also had many concealed passageways built to connect the vessel's key areas, such as his personal quarters and the [[Command Salon]].<ref name="Fury" />

==History==
===Beginning===
{{Quote|They named a GAG Star Destroyer for my dead boy? The kriffing rodders!|Han Solo|<ref name="Tempest" />}}
[[File:GAG_raid.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Anakin Solo'' served as the personal vessel of the Galactic Alliance Guard, a secret police unit led by Colonel Jacen Solo.]]
Launched in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] from the [[General Crix Madine Military Reserve]], the ''Anakin Solo'' was designed specifically for the Galactic Alliance Guard, and as such was painted black and crewed at least partially with GAG personnel. [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], still stewing over [[Anakin Solo]]'s death, made complaints in colorful vocabulary on the name of the ''Anakin''.<ref name="Tempest" />

===The defense of Hapes===
The ''Anakin Solo'' had just completed its shakedown cruise when Jacen Solo took the ship to [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] to defend [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] from the burgeoning insurrection there. The ship also served as a safe location to keep [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana]] away from assassins.<ref name="Tempest" />

The ''Anakin Solo'' saw its first victory during the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]], where its commander, Jacen Solo, succeeded in dismantling the Hapan fleet assembled by [[Ducha]] [[AlGray]] and her [[Heritage Council]].<ref name="Tempest" />

At Hapes, Jacen ordered the ''Anakin'' to fire on the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] when he suspected his parents to be involved in the plot by the [[Five Worlds]] to kill Tenel Ka. The ''Falcon'' was nearly destroyed, and his parents' [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguards, [[Cakhmaim]] and [[Meewalh]], were killed.<ref name="Tempest" />

===Further actions===
Jacen later commanded the ''Anakin Solo'' during an attempt to break up a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation near [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Solo succeeded in his endeavor, capturing [[Uran Lavint]] and her ship ''[[Breathe My Jets]]''. It was later used in combat during the [[Blockade of Corellia]] and the [[Battle of Gilatter VIII]].

===The bombardment of Kashyyyk===
{{Quote|But I never expected the order I got. Fire into the forests? I had to ask my CO to repeat that. But that's what Solo wanted. And so every battery on the ''Black Annie'' that had a firing arc opened up.|Tirs Maladane|<ref name="TEGTW" />}}
[[File:Battle_of_Kashyyyk_by_Darren_Tan.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The bombardment of Kashyyyk was carried out by the ''Anakin Solo'' on the orders of Darth Caedus.]]
The ''Anakin Solo'' later participated in the [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kuat]], before breaking off of the battle with the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]] to go to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to confront the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] after the Order had deserted the Galactic Alliance at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. While above Kashyyyk, Jacen, who had recently renamed himself Darth Caedus, ordered the ''Anakin Solo''{{'s}} long-range turbolasers to [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombard]] the planet's surface, on the advice of his younger cousin Ben after the Wookiees refused to yield to him. The bombardment caused a massive forest fire, which destroyed numerous [[Wroshyr tree/Legends|wroshyr trees]]. In retaliation, a Wookiee squadron of [[Owool Interceptor]]s attacked the bridge and wiped out the command crew.

The Jedi, under the leadership of [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|attacked]] the ''Anakin Solo'' and the Fifth Fleet surrounding it in their [[StealthX]]s. As the Jedi were beginning their attack, the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] and [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] fleets from the Battle of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] arrived.

As Luke and Jaina Solo began an attack run on the ''Anakin Solo'', Caedus took his StealthX out into the battle. After Luke's StealthX was destroyed by friendly fire from Jaina, he and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] managed to sneak aboard the ''Anakin''. While onboard, Luke sabotaged all of the ''Anakin''{{'s}} long-range turbolasers before confronting Caedus, who at that point had Ben trapped in the [[Embrace of Pain]] in a secret [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] bay aboard the Star Destroyer. A fierce [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] ensued, leaving all three men severely injured, but the Skywalkers managed to flee, sparing Caedus' life on moral grounds. The destruction of the long-range turbolasers caused two thousand casualties aboard the flagship.

Towards the end of the battle, the increasingly surrounded ''Anakin Solo'' was nearly destroyed by the [[Hapan]] fleet. Caedus' parents [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] had convinced Tenel Ka that her lover had turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], and when Caedus refused to surrender, the Hapans opened fire on the already damaged vessel. The ''Anakin Solo'' and all aboard would have likely been destroyed had the rogue Dark Jedi [[Alema Rar]] not aided Caedus in his [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], allowing for indecision on the [[Confederation]]'s part and the escape of the failing Star Destroyer. Caedus succeeded in diverting the Confederation's advance on the Core Worlds, but had completely lost the love and support of his family and friends. In his isolation and bitterness, he came to regret naming his flagship after his late brother, claiming he "despised the brat".

===Solo command===
[[File:C-GA_War.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Caedus executed one of his officers, Lieutenant Patra Tebut, on the bridge of the ''Anakin Solo''.]]
The ''Anakin Solo'' would again see action during a "negotiation" between the Galactic Alliance and Corellia. However, the negotiations were merely a ruse to lure Caedus out to an area of deep space so that a now functioning [[Centerpoint Station]] could wipe out Caedus, the ''Anakin Solo'', and the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]].

Due to interference by the Jedi in StealthXs, who were tracking Caedus and had managed to plant a holocom aboard the ''Anakin Solo'', Caedus left the vessel in a [[TIE Reconnaissance Fighter|Blur]] scouting vehicle as he fled his flagship, suspecting a bomb had been planted aboard. As the Jedi pursued him, Caedus ordered the ''Anakin Solo'' to provide cover, and thus the ship was not with the rest of the Second Fleet when Centerpoint Station was fired.

In retaliation to the firing of Centerpoint, Solo took the ''Anakin Solo'' as the flagship of the force which attacked Centerpoint in an attempt to capture the gravitic weapon. During the [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Second Galactic Civil War)|battle]], the ''Anakin Solo'' was boarded by [[Iella Wessiri Antilles]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], Han Solo, R2-D2, Luke and Ben Skywalker, and [[Saba Sebatyne]], in a successful attempt to rescue [[Hapan]] [[Chume'da]] Allana, whom Caedus had kidnapped in order to force Hapan alliance with the Galactic Alliance.

When Centerpoint was destroyed by Jedi saboteurs during the battle, the ''Anakin Solo'' avoided destruction, as it was positioned far away from the blast radius. Enraged at the loss of his daughter and the destruction of Centerpoint, Caedus murdered [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Patra Tebut]] on the bridge of the ''Anakin Solo'' before ordering a return to Coruscant in light of the disaster.

===Endgame===
[[File:Jaina_vs_Caedus.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Jaina Solo infiltrated the ''Anakin Solo'' and killed her twin brother, ending Caedus' reign as the Dark Lord of the Sith.]]
Towards the end of the war, the ship participated in the [[Battle of Uroro Station]], alongside the ''[[Megador]]'' and a fleet of [[Imperial Remnant]] ships.<ref name="Invincible" />

The vessel was badly damaged in the battle, with most of the bridge tower destroyed and the remainder of the ship being heavily damaged by Jedi-flown StealthX fighters. Jaina Solo infiltrated the ''Anakin'' during the battle and dueled Caedus one last time. With Caedus more focused on saving Tenel Ka and Allana from an Imperial [[nanovirus]] attack than defending himself, he was ultimately struck down by his sister.<ref name="Invincible" />

After Caedus' death, the surviving crew members who had not defected were taken off the ship and sent to ground based detention centers. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], a number of Jedi, and their allies captured the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]] which had holed up on the ''Anakin''. There, he forced them to return to the Galactic Alliance, and placed them under the command of [[Jagged Fel]].<ref name="Invincible" />

==Behind the scenes==
Although the novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]'' stated that it was solidly black, the artwork for the ''Anakin Solo'' included in ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' depicted it with a slightly darker gray color of an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer.
